Is Nintendo Switch Online worth it in 2026? Our verdict

Today, we’re going over every single aspect of Nintendo Switch Online as well as the strengths and weaknesses of each one to answer the question of whether the service is worth it. Believe it or not, Nintendo Switch Online is turning eight years old later this year. And needless to say, it didn’t go over all too well when it...

The post Is Nintendo Switch Online worth it in 2026? Our verdict appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

Outbound launch trailer – cozy open-world exploration game arrives for Nintendo Switch 2, Switch

Going along with the launch this week, we’ve have a new trailer for Outbound, the cozy open-world exploration game. Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch owners can pick up the title now. More information can be found in the following store description: Outbound is a cozy open-world exploration game set in a utopian near future. Start with an empty camper van...

text:
Necro Pop, a game designed for the NeoGeo, coming to Nintendo Switch

Nalua Studio is hard at work on Necro Pop, and has confirmed plans to bring the game to Nintendo Switch. Look forward to a release date soon. Necro Pop was originally intended to be a new game for the NeoGeo. The action platformer with dungeon exploration elements will have you gaining new abilities and upgrades along the way as you...

The post Necro Pop, a game designed for the NeoGeo, coming to Nintendo Switch appeared first on Nintendo Everything.
